description: Stub tool library for v1 workflow engine — see docs/agnt-workflow-audit.md §6.3. Hard-coded minimum set; the real WorkflowToolRegistry (T1 step 4) will replace this with a dynamic loader that reads from the same paths agnt-gg uses (tools/library/{triggers,actions,utilities,controls}/).

generate-with-ai-llm.description: Single LLM call — stateless, one-shot, no sub-agent loop.

mcp-client.description: Invoke a tool on a registered MCP server. Resolved by McpRegistry at step-execution time.

execute-javascript.description: Run a JS snippet with the previous step's output as inputData. Sandboxed.

for-loop.description: Iterate over an array. Has a 'done' output (one per iteration) and a 'loop' output (after the last iteration). Bounded by edge.maxIterations.

delay.description: Pause for N milliseconds before continuing. Resolved as a control-flow node — does not appear as a Delegation kind.

stop-workflow.description: Built-in terminator — sets engine.stopRequested=true with an optional reason.

webhook-listener.description: Long-lived HTTP listener. Trigger lifecycle is a property of the WorkflowDelegation (manual/webhook/timer), not a sibling kind (audit §5.1 #1).

trigger-timer.description: Cron-style timer trigger. Same as webhook-listener — trigger config is a property of the WorkflowDelegation.
